description: Black wallet with mustard accents, has a flap style opening with a press buttoned closure with embossed branding Has three main compartments (one zippered compartment)Two slip pockets, three card holders, and a flap with one transparent id card holder, three card holders and one slip pocket on the left fold One slip pocket and one coin holder in the centre fold One slip pocket, one zipped pocket and a mobile pouch with Velcro closure on the back Warranty: 180 daysWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
